title: The Rose in Anger
author: danie-ware
description: A novella following the Sisters of Battle as their faith is tested in fire and blood. When rage threatens to consume all reason, it falls to one Sister to decide whether anger is a weapon or a weakness — and whether the Emperor's justice can survive intact.

title: Prisoners of Waaagh!
author: justin-woolley
description: Imperial soldiers find themselves captured by Orks and dragged into the chaotic heart of a Waaagh! To survive long enough for rescue — or escape — they must understand the brutal logic of greenskin culture, where only strength commands respect.

title: Traitor by Deed
author: ben-counter
description: A Space Marine must confront the ultimate accusation — that his deeds, however well-intentioned, have made him a traitor in the eyes of the Imperium. Loyalty and honour are tested when the line between heroism and heresy blurs beyond recognition.

title: Bonereapers
author: david-guymer
description: The Ossiarch Bonereapers march to harvest the bones of the living, their tithe of death demanded by Nagash himself. A tale of unstoppable undead legions and the desperate resistance of those who stand in their path across the Mortal Realms.

title: Spark of Revolution
author: gary-kloster
description: A single act of defiance ignites into open revolt in the depths of a Necromunda hive. As rebellion spreads through the underhive, the question becomes whether the spark of revolution can survive long enough to become a flame — or whether the ruling guilds will extinguish it before it ever burns bright.
